2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the pagemap_scan_hugetlb_entry function where it incorrectly checks for partial huge pages by comparing against HPAGE_SIZE, which is incorrect for gigantic hugetlb hstates. The correct approach is to compare against the actual page size of the hstate. This fix ensures that the walker does not prematurely abort the write protection (WP) check.
